inputs.prompt: Raw notes: Interviewed Dr. James Okoro, marine biologist at Coastal Research Institute, Jan 15 2026 over Zoom, 40 min, about microplastic accumulation in estuaries. He referenced his 2024 paper 'Estuarine Microplastic Concentrations and Tidal Patterns' in Marine Pollution Bulletin, Vol 189. Also used the Environment Agency's 2025 Water Quality Report (downloaded from gov.uk). Spoke to a local fisherman who didn't want his name used — background only, Jan 20, phone, about declining catches. Found an article by Rebecca Shaw in The Guardian, Dec 3 2025, 'The Rivers That Run Plastic.' Purpose: Internal editorial record. Style: Plain editorial. Grouping: By type.

Raw notes: Read a book called The Attention Merchants by Tim Wu. Also watched a TED talk by Tristan Harris. And I read an article but I can't remember where. Purpose: Bibliography for a podcast episode.

Raw notes: Interviewed Prof. Katrin Braun, Humboldt University Berlin, Feb 2026, about housing co-operatives in Germany. Used a 2024 Eurostat dataset on housing affordability (table TESSI190). Referenced a report by the Friedrich-Ebert-Stiftung called 'Wohnen in der Krise' (2023). Found an article in Der Spiegel by Anna Weber, Jan 2026, about Berlin's Mietendeckel failure. Also used data from the Statistisches Bundesamt on rental price indices. Confidential source: unnamed Berlin city official, background only, about political resistance to rent regulation. Purpose: Fact-checking record for a documentary. Style: Plain editorial. Grouping: By type.
